name: Zapier
description: Connect to 7,000+ apps and automate workflows. Use Zapier's AI Actions to trigger any Zap directly from the agent.

name: Atlassian
description: Manage Jira issues, Confluence pages, and Bitbucket repositories. Full integration with the Atlassian suite.

name: Linear
description: Create and manage Linear issues, projects, and cycles. Streamline engineering project management from the agent.

name: Notion
description: Read and write Notion pages, databases, and blocks. Integrate your knowledge base directly with the agent.

name: Stripe
description: Access Stripe payments, customers, invoices, and subscriptions. Build financial automations and reporting workflows.

name: Cloudflare
description: Manage Cloudflare Workers, DNS records, KV storage, and Pages deployments through natural language commands.

name: Sentry
description: Query Sentry errors, performance traces, and releases. Diagnose issues and navigate your monitoring data conversationally.

name: Exa
description: Neural web search engine optimized for AI agents. Search the web with semantic understanding and get clean, structured results.

name: HubSpot
description: Manage CRM contacts, deals, and pipelines. Query marketing analytics and automate sales workflows.

name: Supabase
description: Query Supabase databases, manage authentication, and interact with edge functions directly from the agent.

name: Figma
description: Access Figma files, components, styles, and variables. Read and inspect designs, extract design tokens, and navigate your Figma workspace from the agent.
